intro: Patagonium landbeckii, also known as Lomariopsis landbeckii, is a species of flowering plant in the fern family (Dryopteridaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in reducing inflammation and improving overall well-being. The bioactive constituents of Patagonium landbeckii include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Patagonium landbeckii is commonly prepared as a tea or tincture, and is often used to support immune function and reduce symptoms of respiratory tract infections.
